title: Mazhaikulle Lyrics Puriyatha Puthir
stanzas:
Mazhaikulle nanaiyum
oru kaatrai pola allavaa
manam

unai paarkkum podhu
enthan vaarthai oomai
enavae maarum.

nee en uyirilaagum
oru pudhiya thaagam
thaanadaa

yaen yaen siragu
neelgirathu
parakka thonugirathe
yaenadaa

poonkaatril adi
un vaasam adhai
thaedi thaedi
tholainthen.

nee meendu vara
naan thaanadi en
vazhvin vazhvai koduthen

yaaro ivan yaaro
theeraa neram venum
ivanodu serndhida

yaaro ivan yaaro
kaanaa thooram
pogum ivan
kaigal korthida

yaeno yaeno nenjil
pookkal pookindratho
moongil kaatil oru
raagam kaetkindratho (2)

nee yaen karai puranda
oru aatrai pola
ennil sergiraai

theeyil karugi pogum
oru panjin nilaiyil
enai aakkinaai.

kanne unnai kandaale
munne nenjil kaayangal
penne valikkuthe. (2)

neeyum ini naanum
naamaai sera kodi
inbangal koodanum

thaedum karai thaedum
alai pol inbam endrum
nam vazhvai thaedanum

yaeno yaeno kangal
unnai paarkindratho
mogatheeyil modhi
kadhal serkindratho(2)

kanne unnai kandaale
munne nenjil kaayangal
penne valikkuthe. (2)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Mazhaikulle'?

The song 'Mazhaikulle' expresses deep feelings of love and longing, portraying the emotional connection between two individuals.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In the movie Puriyatha Puthir, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the protagonist's emotional journey and romantic experiences.

Who are the singer and music director of the song?

The details about the singer and music director of 'Mazhaikulle' are currently unknown.

When was 'Mazhaikulle' released?

'Mazhaikulle' was released on March 31, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: 'Mazhaikulle' is a soulful melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing, resonating with anyone who has experienced deep emotions. The song's lyrics convey a sense of yearning and connection, making it perfect for romantic occasions. Its soothing composition enhances the emotional depth, allowing listeners to immerse themselves in the feelings it evokes. Overall, this song stands out as a poignant expression of love in the film Puriyatha Puthir.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mazhaikulle is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing, beautifully encapsulated in the film Puriyatha Puthir. The song's heartfelt lyrics and soothing composition create an enchanting atmosphere that resonates with listeners. Experience the magic of this romantic ballad that speaks to the soul and evokes deep emotions.
stanzaMeanings: In the rain, my heart feels like a gentle breeze.
When I see you, my words become silent and change.
You become a new desire in my life.
Why are my wings turning blue? I feel like flying.
In the breeze, I searched for your presence and lost it.
You are the one who gave me life, I have given my life to you.
Who is this person? I need time to connect with him.
Who is this person? I see him moving away, his hands are reaching out.
Why, why are flowers blooming in my heart? In the shade of the clouds, a melody is calling.
You are like a wave that has come to my shore, you are entering me.
In the fire, you have transformed me into a golden state.
When I saw you, my heart was filled with emotions, dear.
Now, you and I will unite, and happiness will come together.
We will seek joy like waves searching for the shore.
Why, why are my eyes looking at you? In the mist, love is forming.
When I saw you, my heart was filled with emotions, dear.
